json_schema.description:
Run a model on a Hafnia dataset split and compute detection metrics when ground truth is available.

Loads the dataset (the hidden dataset when running on the Hafnia platform, otherwise a public
sample dataset), runs the model on the requested split, and - when the split has ground-truth
annotations - computes detection metrics and logs them through ``HafniaLogger``. When the split
has no ground truth (e.g. a held-out test set without labels) the metric step is skipped, so the
same script can also be used as a pure inference pass.

The ``model_class_mapping`` and ``dataset_class_mapping`` flags project predictions and/or
ground truth into a common label space, which is needed when a pretrained model (e.g. trained on
COCO) is benchmarked against a dataset with a different label space. When ``save_annotations`` is
set (default), the dataset with predictions appended as a new prediction task on each sample is
written - annotations only, no image data - to the experiment artifacts folder for downstream
analysis or visualization.

model_path.description: Path to the trained model archive (.zip). Note: this is ignored when a checkpoint is available (e.g. a checkpoint selected for the experiment on the Hafnia platform) - the checkpoint is benchmarked instead of this model.
model_path.title: Model Path

model_class_mapping.description: Class mapping applied to the model predictions to remap them into a common label space with the ground truth. Options: [None, 'COCO2OnlyVehicle', 'Midwest2OnlyVehicle']
model_class_mapping.title: Model Class Mapping

dataset_class_mapping.description: Class mapping applied to the dataset ground-truth labels to remap them into a common label space with the predictions. Options: [None, 'COCO2OnlyVehicle', 'Midwest2OnlyVehicle']
dataset_class_mapping.title: Dataset Class Mapping

save_annotations.description: Write the predictions (annotations only, no image data) to the experiment artifacts folder.
save_annotations.title: Save Annotations

samples.description: Limit the number of samples to run on. Useful for faster testing.
samples.title: Samples

ensemble_extra.description: Extra model archive (.zip) paths to ensemble with the primary model/checkpoint. Each runs inference and all are fused via WBF into ONE prediction file — a single inference pipeline (AI City Track 6 ensemble rule).
ensemble_extra.title: Ensemble Extra

tta_hflip.description: Add a horizontal-flip TTA view for every ensemble member (doubles inference; fused via WBF).
tta_hflip.title: Tta Hflip

wbf_iou.description: WBF IoU threshold for clustering boxes across members/views.
wbf_iou.title: Wbf Iou

wbf_skip_box_thr.description: Drop input boxes below this confidence before WBF.
wbf_skip_box_thr.title: Wbf Skip Box Thr

json_schema.title: mainArgs
